title: Sweepstakes Winner
writer: John W. Krafft, Albert DeMond, Hugh Cummings
actors: Marie Wilson, Johnnie Davis, Allen Jenkins
plot: A naive girl has $1,000 and is told to have two broke bookies bet it for her. They lose the money and she gets a job as a waitress. They come into the cafe and convince her to buy an Irish Sweepstake ticket.
